title: lophiaris pumila
intro: Lophiaris pumila, also known as Small-flowered Lophiaris or Small-flowered Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lophiaris pumila include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption.
